taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, State management, Performance optimization
skill_match_scores: React:1.0, Next.js:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, State management:0.0, Performance optimization:1.0
must_have_quals: Deep expertise in React, Next.js, and TypeScript, with strong knowledge of state management and performance optimization, Proven experience architecting and scaling complex Next.js applications (App Router, SSR, SSG, ISR), Strong command of Tailwind CSS, SASS, or SCSS, delivering polished, pixel-perfect UIs, Experience with data-fetching libraries like React Query (or similar), Skilled in building smooth, engaging interfaces with advanced CSS animations, transitions, and layout techniques, Strong understanding of caching strategies and CDN integrations for global performance at scale, Experience with React Server Components in production environments, Familiar with internationalization and localization strategies in Next.js applications, Comfortable operating in a fast-paced startup environment with rapid iteration cycles, A strong design eye and portfolio demonstrating high-quality front-end work
preferred_quals: Experience with GSAP for advanced animations, Experience with Three.js, React Three Fiber (R3F), or immersive 3D experiences
core_responsibilities: Build and refine sleek, high-quality user interfaces from low-fidelity wireframes, Implement god-like CSS to create exceptional, pixel-perfect experiences, Optimize front-end performance to ensure seamless interactions, Work closely with design and engineering to bring ideas to life with precision and speed, Contribute to our product’s core architecture and front-end best practices
job_summary: Profound is on a mission to help companies understand and control their AI presence. As a Frontend Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping high-performance, visually stunning React applications that power the future of AI-driven marketing experiences.
